prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Charging & diagnostics, part of the HVAC-R scope. The observed field condition is: gauge readout interpretation (low charge vs. TXV starving vs. dirty coil - classic FD triple). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: mfr charging charts. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Charging & diagnostics (service call)
